description_long: This rifle features a streamlined, angular design with a predominantly black body and a distinct brown section near the fore-end, likely representing a wooden or polymer handguard. The barrel is long and slender, extending from the main body, and the stock is sharply angled, giving it a modern tactical appearance. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower receiver, with the magazine itself not clearly visible. The rifle lacks any visible advanced optics or attachments, suggesting a basic iron sight system. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and synthetic materials. The finish is matte, reducing glare and enhancing concealment in urban environments.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a black body and brown handguard, featuring a long barrel and a sharply angled stock. The design is robust and minimalistic, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the brown handguard and the long, slender barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the muzzle, the width of the handguard, and the angular stock profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with the stock and handguard details more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and grip area, with the barrel receding into the background.
